basic_details.job_title: DRDO SAG Paid Intern Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 40 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Scientific Analysis Group (DRDO SAG) has officially announced the Paid Intern Recruitment 2026 with 40 openings. The detailed notification was published on 06 June 2026 at the official DRDO SAG website. Candidates who meet the age criteria as specified in the official notification and hold B.E./B.Tech (IV Year) full-time, M.E./M.Tech/M.Sc (II Year) full-time qualifications can now submit their applications via email from now until 15 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply are shared below.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech (IV Year) full time, M.E./M.Tech/M.Sc (II Year) full time
qualification.details: Final year B.E./B.Tech or M.E/M.Tech or M.Sc in respective discipline (CS/AI/IT/ISE/Cyber Security, Electronics/ECE/EIE, Physics, Mathematics/Statistics).

salary_details.details: Stipend of Rs. 15,000/- after 3 months and Rs. 15,000/- after 6 months.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DRDO SAG Paid Intern Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DRDO SAG Paid Intern posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the DRDO SAG Paid Intern recruitment is 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Paid Intern position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 40 vacancies announced for the Paid Intern position at the Scientific Analysis Group (DRDO SAG).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this internship?
faq.answer: Candidates must be in their final year of B.E./B.Tech or pursuing M.E./M.Tech or M.Sc in the specified disciplines to be eligible.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary or stipend offered for the Paid Intern role?
faq.answer: The consolidated stipend offered ranges from Rs. 15,000 to Rs. 30,000, with specific amounts of Rs. 15,000/- after 3 months and Rs. 15,000/- after 6 months of service.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application process for the DRDO SAG Paid Intern recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply by sending their complete application with all required documents via email before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the DRDO SAG Paid Intern posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What are the disciplines for which the internship is offered?
faq.answer: The internship is offered in disciplines such as CS/AI/IT/ISE/Cyber Security, Electronics/ECE/EIE, Physics, and Mathematics/Statistics.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Paid Intern position?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves evaluation based on CGPA, followed by an interview or interaction, document verification, and the final merit list.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Scientific Analysis Group (DRDO SAG) located?
faq.answer: The Scientific Analysis Group (DRDO SAG) is located in Delhi, with the pincode 110054.

faq.question: Q10. When will the internship start?
faq.answer: The internship is scheduled to commence on 1st July 2026.
